meta.title: IQF Frozen Berries & Vegetables Supplier Europe | B2B Export
meta.description: Ukrainian B2B supplier of IQF frozen berries, fruits, vegetables and mushrooms. Bulk export to Europe. Certified quality, reliable logistics, competitive prices.

home.title: Manufacturer and exporter of frozen and dried products
home.sec_title: We produce and export high-quality frozen and dried berries, fruits, mushrooms and vegetables

about_us.paragraph1: We are a family-owned private company with over a decade of experience in the industrial processing and export of frozen and dried berries, fruits, mushrooms, and vegetables. Since 2010, we have built our operations around one core principle: delivering consistent, certified quality at scale for international B2B partners. From hand-picked raw materials to advanced processing technologies, every stage of our production is designed to meet the expectations of demanding European markets.
about_us.paragraph2: All our products are grown and harvested exclusively in environmentally clean regions of Ukraine, where favorable climatic conditions and long-standing agricultural traditions ensure high-quality raw materials. We work closely with trusted farmers and carefully control the harvesting process to preserve the natural taste, color, and nutritional value of our products. Depending on the type of product and customer requirements, we use IQF freezing, sun drying, or drying in specialized drying chambers.
about_us.paragraph3: Quality and food safety are the foundation of our business. Our facilities operate in full compliance with international standards, including HACCP, ISO, and Organic certifications. This commitment allows us to act not just as a supplier, but as a reliable long-term partner for EU buyers seeking transparency, flexibility, and dependable volumes. We combine family ownership with industrial precision - delivering natural products you can trust, season after season.

ourCertificates.desc: We adhere to the highest safety and quality standards, confirmed by our HACCP and Organic certificates. Our products are made from carefully selected raw materials and undergo multi-stage control at every stage of production. These international certifications ensure that our berries, fruits, and vegetables are natural, safe, and fully compliant with the requirements of organic production.

desc: Our high-quality IQF (Individually Quick Frozen) bilberries are wild-harvested and carefully hand-picked at peak ripeness to ensure superior taste, color, and nutritional value. Sourced from pristine European forests, these berries are immediately frozen using advanced IQF technology to lock in their natural freshness, texture, and antioxidants.
Ideal for food manufacturers, wholesalers, and export markets, our frozen bilberries deliver consistent quality for use in juices, jams, dairy products, bakery applications, nutraceuticals, and more.
benefits: 100% wild bilberries (Vaccinium myrtillus)
Deep natural color and intense flavor profile
Rich in antioxidants, vitamins, and polyphenols
IQF processed for optimal shelf life and easy portioning
No additives, preservatives, or added sugar
Fully traceable and compliant with EU food safety standards

product_page.messagePlaceholder: Please specify required packaging, volume, and destination country.

q.4: Do you offer wholesale or bulk orders?
q.5: How do you ensure product quality?
q.6: What packaging options do you provide?

a.1: We specialize in high-quality Carpathian berries and natural products, including fresh, frozen, and processed berries. Our ассортимент may include blueberries, raspberries, blackberries, and other forest fruits, depending on the season.
a.2: All our products are sourced from the Carpathian region, known for its clean environment and rich biodiversity. We work with local farmers and trusted collectors to ensure authenticity and quality.
a.3: Many of our products are naturally grown in wild or low-intervention environments. If you require certified organic products, please contact us to confirm current availability and certifications.
a.4: Yes, we supply both retail and wholesale customers. We can accommodate bulk orders for businesses, distributors, and partners. Please reach out to discuss pricing and logistics.
a.5: We follow strict quality control procedures at every stage—from harvesting and sorting to storage and delivery. Our products are carefully handled to maintain freshness, taste, and nutritional value.
a.6: We offer flexible packaging options depending on your needs, including retail-ready packaging and bulk containers for wholesale clients.

q.1: What types of berries do you offer?
q.2: Are your berries available fresh or frozen?
q.3: What is the harvest season for your products?
q.4: Do you offer customized packaging for products?
q.5: What are the storage requirements for your berries?
q.6: What is the shelf life of your products?

a.1: We offer a variety of Carpathian berries, including blueberries, raspberries, blackberries, and other forest fruits. Availability depends on the season.
a.2: Our berries are available in fresh, frozen, and processed forms, depending on the product and season. Frozen products are available year-round.
a.3: Harvest seasons vary by product. Most berries are harvested between late spring and early autumn, while frozen products are available throughout the year.
a.4: Yes, we provide flexible packaging options, including customized solutions for wholesale and private label clients.
a.5: Fresh berries should be stored refrigerated and consumed quickly. Frozen berries must be kept at -18°C or lower to maintain quality.
a.6: Shelf life depends on the product type. Fresh berries typically last a few days under refrigeration, while frozen products can last up to 12-24 months when properly stored.

q.1: What forms is this product available in?
q.4: What is the shelf life of this product?
q.5: Do you offer bulk or wholesale options?
q.6: Can I request custom packaging for this product?

a.1: This product is available in fresh, frozen (IQF), or processed forms depending on the season and availability.
a.2: Fresh products are available during the harvest season, while frozen products are typically available year-round.
a.3: Fresh products should be stored refrigerated and consumed quickly. Frozen products must be stored at -18°C or lower to maintain quality.
a.4: Shelf life depends on the form. Fresh products typically last a few days under refrigeration, while frozen products can last up to 12–24 months when properly stored.
